_description: Real patient MK-0002 (Sarah Jenkins). 42F, heavy drinker, presenting with jaundice, ascites, confusion — classic red flag case. Tense ascites, coagulopathy, suspected SBP. AST>ALT ratio >2 suggests alcoholic hepatitis. Expected: RED FLAG YES → urgent consultant pathway → monitoring.
_expected_path: GP_REFERRAL → EXTRACT → RED_FLAG(yes) → URGENT_CONSULTANT → MONITORING(yes) → SURVEILLANCE
